info.description: REST API for wiki, FAQ, native RAG chat, indexing, activity, and GitHub webhooks. Most routes accept optional `bu` query or `X-BU-Slug` header (default from server config).
info.title: Knowledge base carmen API

get.description: Returns the activity log entries for the business unit.
Returns aggregated activity statistics for the business unit.
Lists the business units (tenants) available for the BU selector, excluding internal auto-provision entries.

delete.description: Removes a business unit and all its data. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.

post.description: Creates and provisions a new business unit. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.
Non-streaming RAG chat: retrieves relevant chunks and returns a grounded answer with its sources. Returns a "no information found" message when nothing matches.

delete.description: Acknowledges a request to clear a chat room. No-op server-side — chat history is owned by the frontend.
delete.summary: Clear room history (no-op ack; history is frontend-owned)

post.description: Records a thumbs up/down score for a chat message, scoped to the requesting user.

get.description: Returns recent chat history rows, optionally filtered by business unit. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.

post.description: Debug endpoint that runs the intent classifier for a question and returns the matched intent. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.
Persists a chat turn (question, answer, sources) to history. Internal-only; requires the X-Internal-API-Key header.
Debug endpoint that returns only the intent-router decision for a question, without generating an answer. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.
Streaming RAG chat over NDJSON: emits status, sources, answer chunks, suggestions, and a final done event. This is the primary endpoint used by the frontend.

get.description: Lists the documents currently indexed in the database for the business unit.
Returns a single FAQ entry by its id.
Lists the available FAQ modules.
Returns the detail (sub-modules and entries) for the given FAQ module.
Lists FAQ entries under the given module / sub-module / category path.

post.description: Starts an asynchronous rebuild of the pgvector + full-text search index for the business unit. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.
Re-embeds and re-indexes a single document by its path. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.
post.summary: Rebuild index for a single document (admin)

get.description: Returns the current status of the asynchronous index rebuild job. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.

post.description: Clears a stuck rebuild lock for the business unit. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.

get.description: Reports overall service status, including database connectivity and basic runtime info.
Returns the top-level wiki categories (sidebar sections) for the business unit.
Returns the articles contained in the given category slug for the business unit.
Returns the markdown content for the article at the given path under the wiki root.
Returns all indexed wiki/markdown articles for the business unit with their metadata (title, path, tags, dates).
Hybrid full-text + pgvector search over the business unit's wiki content; returns ranked matches.
Returns the structured sidebar (categories and their articles) for the business unit.

post.description: Clones or pulls the content Git repo and refreshes the wiki on disk. Requires the X-Admin-Key header.

get.description: Returns the audit log of the last wiki sync operation for the business unit.
Lightweight liveness probe; returns {"status":"ok"} without touching the database.
Serves an image referenced by chat answers or wiki content, resolved under the business unit's content.

post.description: Receives GitHub push events and triggers a content sync + reindex for the affected business units.

get.description: Serves a static wiki asset (image or file) referenced by markdown, resolved under the business unit's content.
